body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features translucent violet skin revealing swirling crimson mist within, with the prominent horns replaced by hollow, skeletal structures glowing with pale silver energy. The robust body shifts to a semi-transparent ebony form with faint ghostly white ripples distorting the air around it, while the long pointed tail dissolves into wispy shadowy vapour trailing behind. Short stubby legs become faintly outlined in pale silver, appearing to phase through the ground, and the original bright orange and white coloration is entirely replaced by deep violet and ebony with ghostly white highlights. The wings, though invisible in the sprite, manifest as faint, tattered energy trails shimmering with crimson mist.
signature_feature: Hollow horns: skeletal structures glowing with pale silver energy against translucent violet skin.
